/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 01-10-22/CONTD: TRIAL/DOP/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 16/TRANS 16:FORTHWITH FOR DEF BAIL MOTION/
